query:
SELECT id, name, position, altPositions, club, league, nationality, overall, potential, age
FROM players
ORDER BY 
  CASE position
    WHEN 'GK' THEN 1 WHEN 'GOL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'ZAG' THEN 2 WHEN 'CB' THEN 2
    WHEN 'LD' THEN 3 WHEN 'LE' THEN 3 WHEN 'LB' THEN 3 WHEN 'RB' THEN 3
    WHEN 'VOL' THEN 4 WHEN 'MC' THEN 4 WHEN 'MEI' THEN 4 WHEN 'MD' THEN 4 WHEN 'ME' THEN 4
    WHEN 'PD' THEN 5 WHEN 'PE' THEN 5 WHEN 'PNT' THEN 5
    WHEN 'ATA' THEN 6 WHEN 'ST' THEN 6
    ELSE 7
  END,
  CAST(overall AS UNSIGNED) DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT id, name, position, altPositions, club, league, nationality, overall, potential, age
FROM players
ORDER BY 
  CASE position
    WHEN 'GK' THEN 1 WHEN 'GOL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'ZAG' THEN 2 WHEN 'CB' THEN 2
    WHEN 'LD' THEN 3 WHEN 'LE' THEN 3 WHEN 'LB' THEN 3 WHEN 'RB' THEN 3
    WHEN 'VOL' THEN 4 WHEN 'MC' THEN 4 WHEN 'MEI' THEN 4 WHEN 'MD' THEN 4 WHEN 'ME' THEN 4
    WHEN 'PD' THEN 5 WHEN 'PE' THEN 5 WHEN 'PNT' THEN 5
    WHEN 'ATA' THEN 6 WHEN 'ST' THEN 6
    ELSE 7
  END,
  CAST(overall AS UNSIGNED) DESC;
